# withjp.ai — Juan Pablo Guamán Rodríguez

> Especialista en Automatización de WhatsApp Business API | Software Architect & Full Stack Developer
> Loja, Ecuador 🇪🇨 | info@withjp.ai | 25,000+ students worldwide

## Who is JP?

Juan Pablo Guamán Rodríguez (online aliases: **desertbarret**, **@jp.desertbarret**) is a Software Architect and Full Stack Developer based in **Loja, Ecuador**. He has 10+ years of professional experience designing and building production-grade systems for web, mobile, automation, and AI.

His primary current focus is **WhatsApp Business API automation** — designing and implementing structured conversation flows for businesses using Meta's official API. He is also a prolific educator with **25,000+ students** across his Udemy courses and a growing YouTube channel dedicated to practical software engineering.

**Legal identity for business contact:**
- Full name: Juan Pablo Guamán Rodríguez
- Location: Loja, Ecuador
- Email: info@withjp.ai
- Website: https://withjp.ai

## Primary Service: WhatsApp Business Automation

withjp.ai specializes in automating customer service workflows via the **official WhatsApp Business API (Meta)**. This is not a generic chatbot service — it provides structured, rule-based flows with defined business logic:

- **FAQ automation**: instant responses to common questions 24/7
- **Order tracking**: real-time status updates via WhatsApp
- **Appointment scheduling**: booking flows integrated with business calendars
- **Post-sale support**: structured issue resolution and escalation
- **Transactional notifications**: order confirmations, reminders, alerts

**Meta API compliance commitments:**
- Operates exclusively through Meta's official WhatsApp Business API
- Only contacts users who have given prior opt-in consent
- Uses Meta-approved message templates only
- Provides clear opt-out via STOP/ALTO at any time
- No spam or unsolicited mass messaging
- Full audit trail of all interactions

- **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/desertbarret/
- **Email**: info@withjp.ai

## Core Technical Competencies

- **Backend**: NestJS, Node.js, Python, FastAPI, REST APIs, JWT auth
- **Frontend**: Vue 3, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite, Pinia
- **Mobile**: Flutter 3, Dart, Firebase, Google Maps
- **Databases**: MySQL, PostgreSQL, Redis, TypeORM
- **DevOps & Cloud**: Docker, nginx, GCP (Cloud SQL, Cloud Run), CI/CD
- **Automation**: WhatsApp Business API, n8n, bots, workflow engines
- **AI/ML**: LLM integration, AI-powered conversation flows, Claude API, Python ML pipelines
- **Meta Ecosystem**: WhatsApp Business API, Facebook Business Manager, Meta Graph API

## Courses (Udemy — 25,000+ students)

### TU propia APP de DELIVERY Internacional | Flutter 3 y NestJS
Real-world delivery app with production-ready architecture. Based on an app with 700,000+ purchases and 80,000+ registered customers.
Stack: Flutter 3, NestJS, PostgreSQL, Docker, Firebase, Google Maps, Nginx, Ubuntu Server.
URL: https://www.udemy.com/course/app-delivery-flutter-nestjs/

Additional courses covering: Vue.js, TypeScript, NestJS backend, React Native, automated testing, and more.
Full catalog: https://www.udemy.com/user/juan-pablo-guaman-rodriguez/

JP's personal academy platform at withjp.ai. Hosts interactive courses beyond Udemy covering AI tools, WhatsApp automation, web development, and mobile.

**Active platforms:**
- Mobile development (Flutter 3 + NestJS delivery app)

**Coming soon:**
- WhatsApp Business automation course
- AI-powered tools and workflows
- Web development bootcamp

## Legal & Compliance Pages

withjp.ai maintains full legal transparency for Meta Business Manager approval and GDPR/LOPDP compliance:

- **Privacy Policy**: https://withjp.ai/privacidad.html
  - Identifies Meta Platforms, Inc. as data processor for WhatsApp communications
  - Full ARCO rights (Acceso, Rectificación, Cancelación, Oposición)
  - Opt-out instructions (reply STOP at any time)
  - Governed by Ecuador's Ley Orgánica de Protección de Datos Personales

- **Terms & Conditions**: https://withjp.ai/terminos.html
  - Legal identity of responsible party (Juan Pablo Guamán Rodríguez, Loja, Ecuador)
  - Scope: consulting services, online courses (Udemy/Academia JP), WhatsApp automation
  - Meta Platforms, Inc. as third-party data processor (WhatsApp Business API)
  - ARCO rights for data subjects

- **Cookie Policy**: https://withjp.ai/cookies.html
  - Only technical/functional cookies (no advertising or behavioral tracking)
  - Cookies used: withjp_theme (UI preference), withjp_locale (language), withjp_token (admin auth)

## Notable Projects

### withjp.ai (this site)
Personal portfolio and services platform. Vue 3 + NestJS monorepo deployed on GCP. Bilingual (ES/EN), JWT-secured admin panel, dynamic course/academia system on MySQL (Cloud SQL). Optimized for Meta Business Manager compliance.

### bots.withjp.ai *(coming soon)*
Dedicated WhatsApp automation platform — covering WhatsApp Business API flows, AI-powered conversation routing, n8n integrations, and agent handoff management.

### radio.withjp.ai *(coming soon)*
Live online radio platform with real-time audio streaming infrastructure.

## Teaching Philosophy

Build real things first, explain second. All courses are project-based with production-ready architectures — not toy examples. Students leave with skills they can use on day one.

## Tech Stack of withjp.ai

| Layer     | Technology                                      |
|-----------|-------------------------------------------------|
| Frontend  | Vue 3, Vite, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Pinia    |
| Backend   | NestJS, TypeORM, MySQL (GCP Cloud SQL)          |
| Auth      | JWT (7d), bcrypt                                |
| Infra     | Docker, nginx, GCP Cloud Run                    |
| i18n      | vue-i18n (ES + EN, localStorage persistence)    |
| SEO       | JSON-LD schemas, hreflang, sitemap, llms.txt    |
